narrative:
Sugarcreek 1 (precinct in Stark County) has 966 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
